component_conventions.default_export: always — no named-only exports for React components
component_conventions.server_components: default — add 'use client' only when hooks/browser APIs are needed

banned_patterns: any cast without // eslint-disable comment and justification
useEffect for data fetching (use Server Components or TanStack Query)
inline styles (use CSS Modules or Tailwind)

python.async_convention: all I/O-bound functions must be async
banned_patterns: print() for logging (use structlog or stdlib logging)
synchronous DB calls inside async routes

backend: integration (httpx async client against test DB)

git.commit_convention: Conventional Commits (feat, fix, chore, refactor, test, docs)

api_design.error_format: { detail: string, code: string, field?: string }
api_design.http_methods: GET read, POST create, PATCH partial update, PUT full replace, DELETE

security.file_uploads: MIME type whitelist enforced server-side (not Content-Type header)
security.auth_headers: Bearer token only — no query-param auth
security.cors: explicit allow-list from ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var
security.rate_limiting: Redis-backed per-IP sliding window on all public endpoints
